title: 3 DAYS SOUL CHILL ESCAPE
includes: 2 healing & relaxation sessions (Reiki, sound bath, or meditation)
Outdoor picnic in Paradise Valley or beach sunset picnic
Indoor chill workshop (painting, journaling, or candle-making)
Rooftop dinner with live music or movie night under the stars

title: 5 DAYS HEALING & FLOW RETREAT
includes: Drawing & dinner on the rooftop (with live music)

title: 7 DAYS AWAKENING RETREAT

title: 10 DAYS DIVINE FEMININE JOURNEY
includes: 4 rooftop yoga sessions (mix of sunrise & sunset)
